description: A graphic on a dark brick-textured background styled as a framed instant-photo. The central photograph is a booking-style portrait of a middle-aged man with graying hair against a height-chart wall. Handwritten-style caption text below reads HOMICIDE & METH DISTRIBUTION. A logo at the bottom reads Worst of the Worst with the label Phoenix, above a banner with the Department of Homeland Security seal and ICE.gov/wow.
notable_text: HOMICIDE & METH DISTRIBUTION; Worst of the Worst; Phoenix; ICE.gov/wow
